testcase.name: testOperatorAccessEngineStatusForbidden

testcase.name: testAdminAccessEngineStatusAllowed
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-17T13:54:33.258+05:30 DEBUG 16148 --- [recarding-dashboard-backend] [ main] o.s.jdbc.core.JdbcTemplate : Executing prepared SQL query 2026-06-17T13:54:33.259+05:30 DEBUG 16148 --- [recarding-dashboard-backend] [ main] o.s.jdbc.core.JdbcTemplate : Executing prepared SQL statement [SELECT ENGINEID, ENGINESTATUS, LASTEXECUTIONTIME, NEXTSCHEDULEDRUNTIME, CARDSPROCESSEDPERRUN, AVGPROCESSINGTIMEPERCARD, THREADSRUNPARALLEL, BATCHSIZE, PERIOD FROM MD_ENGINE_CONFIGURATIONS ORDER BY ENGINEID] 2026-06-17T13:54:33.259+05:30 DEBUG 16148 --- [recarding-dashboard-backend] [ main] o.s.jdbc.datasource.DataSourceUtils : Fetching JDBC Connection from DataSource
